bots.title: LXMFy Bots
bots.description: Run simple LXMF bots (echo, notes, reminders) when the LXMFy add-on is installed.
bots.lxmfy_not_detected_desc: To use bots, you must install the LXMFy package:
bots.start_pending: Starting bot… LXMF and Reticulum can take a moment.
bots.restart_pending: Restarting bot… this may take a moment.
bots.never_announced: Not seen on this node yet
bots.address_pending: Not available until the bot has started once
bots.process_log_empty: No log output yet for this bot.
bots.process_log_truncated: Only the end of the log is shown. The full file on disk is larger.

app.name: Reticulum MeshChatX
app.do_not_show_again: Do not show again for this version
app.tutorial_docker_note: If you're running in Docker, ensure you restart the container.
app.manage_identity: Manage your identity, transport participation and LXMF defaults.
app.appearance_description: Switch between light and dark presets anytime.
app.ui_transparency_description: Increases transparency on the main background. Side panels stay solid for readability.
app.ui_glass_enabled_description: Adds a frosted blur effect to cards. When off, cards use solid colors.
app.messages_multi_pane_enabled_description: Show multiple conversations side by side on larger screens. Drag a conversation onto a pane to open it there.
app.nomad_tabs_enabled_description: Open multiple NomadNet pages in tabs on larger screens.
app.rrc_enabled_description: Enable relay chat, hub discovery, and hosting. When off, relay chat is hidden and hub announces are ignored.
app.transport_description: Relay paths and traffic for nearby peers.
app.transport_toggle_description: Route announces, respond to path requests and help your mesh stay online.
app.community_interfaces_description: Show community-maintained presets when adding new interfaces.
app.privacy_data_description: Manage local message history, telemetry, and other privacy options. Deleting here only affects this device.
app.privacy_mode_description: Blocks map tiles, geocoding, LibreTranslate, firmware downloads, and other outbound HTTP/HTTPS from the app. The browser Content Security Policy is tightened to same-origin only.
app.web_exposure_description: The web UI bind address is set at startup via --host or MESHCHAT_HOST. Restrict who can reach it when not bound to loopback.
app.web_exposure_warning_title: This instance is reachable beyond localhost
app.web_exposure_warning_body: Binding to a non-loopback address exposes the web UI on your network. Enable authentication, restrict the port with a firewall, and prefer access over a VPN you control.
app.web_exposure_check_firewall: I restricted port access with a firewall or bind rules
app.web_exposure_check_vpn: Remote access is only via a VPN I control
app.web_ui_ip_allowlist_description: Optional comma-separated IPs or CIDR ranges (for example 127.0.0.1/32, 192.168.1.0/24). Empty allows all clients.
app.landlock_auto_enabled: Enabled automatically on this Linux kernel
app.landlock_kernel_unsupported: Kernel does not support Landlock (5.13+ required)
app.messages_description: Configure how MeshChat handles message delivery failures. Control automatic retry behavior, attachment retransmission, and fallback mechanisms to ensure reliable message delivery across the mesh network.
app.auto_resend_description: Failed messages automatically retry once the destination broadcasts again.
app.retry_attachments_description: Large payloads will also be retried (useful when both peers have high limits).
app.auto_fallback_title: Auto fall back to propagation node
app.auto_fallback_description: Failed direct deliveries are queued on your preferred propagation node.
app.inbound_stamps_required_description: When off, direct messages to you do not require proof-of-work stamps. When on, set the stamp cost below. Higher values mean more work for senders.
app.inbound_stamp_description: Proof-of-work difficulty for direct messages. Range: 1-254. Default: 8.
app.flood_protection_description: Automatically raise the inbound stamp cost when receiving too many messages per minute from many sources. This makes coordinated spam attacks computationally expensive while keeping normal conversations affordable.
app.local_message_auto_delete_title: Delete old messages on this device
app.local_message_auto_delete_description: Removes messages from the local database after the age you set. This only affects this device and no data is deleted from the network.
app.local_message_auto_delete_month_note: Months are counted as 30 days each. Disabled by default.
app.propagation_nodes_description: Keep conversations flowing even when peers are offline.
app.nodes_info_1: Propagation nodes hold messages securely until recipients sync again.
app.nodes_info_2: Nodes peer with each other to distribute encrypted payloads.
app.nodes_info_3: Most nodes retain data ~30 days, then discard undelivered items.
app.run_local_node_description: MeshChat will announce and maintain a node using this local destination hash.
app.fallback_node_description: Messages fallback to this node whenever direct delivery fails.
app.auto_select_node_description: Automatically find and switch to the best available propagation node based on network hops.
app.auto_select_pending: No propagation node selected yet. The app will choose one when available.
app.incoming_message_size_description: Maximum size for one direct LXMF delivery you will accept.
app.propagation_stamp_description: Require proof-of-work stamps for messages sent through your node. Higher values require more work. Range: 13-254. Default: 16. **Note:** Changing this requires a restart.
app.detailed_outbound_send_status_descriptio: Show detailed status like pathfinding, stamp solving, and technical tooltips while sending. When off, a simple checkmark is shown.
app.outbound_transfer_progress_enabled_descr: Show a progress bar with transfer speed, hops, and elapsed time below outbound messages while they are sending.
app.message_timestamp_grouping_description: When on, messages are grouped by date and timestamps are simplified. When off, every message shows its exact time.
app.stranger_protection_description: Control how the app handles messages and attachments from unknown peers.
app.block_stranger_attachments_description: Automatically remove file, image, and audio attachments from people not in your contacts. Text messages are still delivered.
app.block_all_from_strangers_description: Ignore all messages, attachments, and calls from people not in your contacts. Nothing is delivered or saved.
app.show_unknown_contact_banner_description: When enabled, a notice appears at the top of conversations with peers who are not in your contacts.
app.warn_on_stranger_links_description: Show a warning prompt before opening HTTP/HTTPS links sent by peers who are not in your contacts.
app.banishment_description: Customize the visual effect shown for banished peers and nodes.
app.banished_effect_description: Show a visual overlay on banished peers and nodes.
app.banished_text_description: Custom message to display on the overlay.
app.banished_color_description: The color used for the banishment effect.
app.desktop_open_calls_in_separate_window_de: When a call is active, it will be shown in a separate pop-out window rather than inside the app.
app.desktop_hardware_acceleration_enabled_de: Disable this if you experience flickering, black screens, or other graphical issues.
app.libretranslate_url_description: The URL where LibreTranslate API is accessible.
app.reticulum_stack_description: Manage the underlying Reticulum Network Stack.
app.reload_rns_description: Deregister all destinations, stop the current RNS instance, and reload it. This is useful for applying configuration changes or restarting the mesh network stack without restarting the entire application.
app.stop_sync_confirm: Are you sure you want to stop syncing?
app.sync_error_generic: Something went wrong. Try again later.
app.loading_overlay_subtitle: Loading your chats and settings. This usually takes a few seconds.
app.emergency_mode_active: Emergency Mode Active - Using in-memory database and restricted services.
app.blackhole_integration_description: Automatically blackhole identities at the Reticulum transport layer when banishing users in MeshChatX.
app.announce_limits_description: Limit how many announcements are kept in the database and how many are loaded at once. Clear a field and save to restore defaults.
app.announce_store_description: When off, received announces of this type are not saved. This only affects storage and does not stop the network or your own announces. Your local NomadNet node will still be listed.
app.announce_search_max_fetch_hint: Maximum rows read from the database when you use text search on announces (per request).
app.discovered_interfaces_max_return_hint: Maximum discovered and active interface entries returned to the UI.
app.csp_description: Manually add allowed domains for various resources. This is useful for custom map servers, bots, or external integrations.
app.csp_extra_connect_src_description: Additional sources for fetch/websocket connections (e.g. https://api.example.com).
app.csp_extra_img_src_description: Additional sources for images and tiles.
app.csp_extra_script_src_description: Additional sources for scripts (advanced use only).
app.location_source_browser_desc: Uses your browser's geolocation API. Note: In the desktop app, this may use Google services.
app.location_source_manual_desc: Use manually entered coordinates for maximum privacy.
app.telemetry_description: Allow MeshChatX to send and receive telemetry data, such as responding to location requests from trusted peers.
app.telemetry_no_trusted_peers: No trusted peers configured. Trust peers from the chat menu to allow them to request your location.
app.telemetry_trust_granted_alert: Peer is now trusted for telemetry.
app.location_manage_desc: Manage how your location is shared.

common.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this? This cannot be undone.

stickers.settings_description: Your saved images for this identity. Use them in messages or save images from chats. You can also export or import a backup.
stickers.drop_or_click_hint: Drop images here or click to browse (PNG, JPEG, GIF, WebP, BMP, TGS, WebM, max 512 KB each).
stickers.add_more_hint: Drop or click to add more stickers.
stickers.file_too_large: Each sticker must fit within its format limit (TGS 64 KB, WebM 256 KB, image 512 KB).
stickers.unsupported_type: Use PNG, JPEG, GIF, WebP, BMP, TGS, or WebM.

errors.file_too_large_static: Static stickers must be 512 KB or smaller.
errors.file_too_large_animated: Animated TGS stickers must be 64 KB or smaller.
errors.file_too_large_video: Video WEBM stickers must be 256 KB or smaller.
errors.invalid_dimensions: Stickers must be at most 512x512 pixels with one side exactly 512.
errors.invalid_duration: Animated and video stickers must be 3 seconds or shorter.
errors.invalid_fps: Animated stickers must be 30-60 FPS, video stickers up to 30 FPS.
errors.invalid_codec: Video stickers must use the VP9 codec.
errors.invalid_audio: Video stickers must not contain an audio stream.

packs.title: Sticker packs
packs.description: Group stickers into packs you can share or import.
packs.delete_with_stickers: Also delete stickers in this pack
packs.no_stickers: No stickers in this pack yet.

editor.title: Sticker editor
editor.drop_image: Drop an image, or click to browse
editor.size_too_large: Result is larger than 512 KB. Try lowering quality or using PNG with simpler shapes.

sticker_editor.title: Sticker editor
sticker_editor.canvas_hint: Preview is scaled to fit. Export uses a 512×512 canvas.
sticker_editor.too_large: Exported file is larger than 512 KB

sticker_packs.section_description: Group stickers into packs you can share or import.
sticker_packs.empty_pack: No stickers in this pack yet.

gifs.settings_description: Your personal GIF library. Upload GIF and animated WebP files to reuse them in chats. Your most-used GIFs are shown first.
gifs.empty_library: No GIFs yet. Upload a GIF or save one from a chat.
gifs.drop_or_click_hint: Drop GIFs here or click to browse (GIF or WebP, max 5 MB each).
gifs.add_more_hint: Drop or click to add more GIFs.
gifs.file_too_large: Each GIF must be 5 MB or smaller.
gifs.unsupported_type: Use GIF or WebP files only.

maintenance.title: Maintenance & Data
maintenance.description: Manage your local data, clear caches, and backup conversations.
maintenance.clear_messages_desc: Permanently delete all sent and received messages.
maintenance.clear_announces_desc: Remove all discovered peers and nodes from your cache.
maintenance.clear_nomadnet_favs_desc: Remove all saved NomadNetwork nodes from your favorites.
maintenance.clear_lxmf_icons_desc: Remove cached LXMF user icons from your device.
maintenance.clear_stickers_desc: Remove every saved sticker image for this identity.
maintenance.clear_gifs_desc: Remove every saved GIF for this identity.
maintenance.clear_reticulum_docs_desc: Removes all downloaded Reticulum documentation and versions.
maintenance.clear_path_table_desc: Drop all cached Reticulum transport paths. Routes will be re-discovered as needed.
maintenance.export_messages_desc: Download all conversations as a JSON file.
maintenance.import_messages_desc: Restore conversations from a JSON file.
maintenance.clear_confirm: Are you sure? This action cannot be undone.
maintenance.nomadnet_favourites_import_failed: Could not import NomadNet favourites file

identities.title: Identities
identities.manage: Manage and switch between multiple Reticulum identities.
identities.import_hint: Upload a key file or paste a Base32 identity key.
identities.create_first: Create a new identity to get started.
identities.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete identity "{name}"? This cannot be undone.
identities.paste_base32_placeholder: Paste your base32 identity key here...
identities.identity_copied: Identity Base32 key copied to clipboard

about.title: About
about.database_health_description: Quick check, WAL tuning, and recovery tools for the MeshChatX database.
about.security_integrity_description: Advisory tamper-evidence. Detects unexpected changes to your identity and database files between startups. It is not tamper-proofing and does not protect against an attacker with access to this account.
about.integrity_backend_error: The application backend binary (unpacked from ASAR) appears to have changed since the last snapshot. If you did not update or modify it, review the change.
about.integrity_data_error: Your identity or database files appear to have changed while the app was closed.
about.integrity_warning_footer: This is advisory, not a confirmed compromise. If you updated the app or edited these files yourself, you can acknowledge to reset the baseline.
about.no_integrity_violations: No unexpected changes to monitored files since last startup.
about.automatic_backups_desc: Automated daily snapshots of your database.
about.contact_propagation_hint: Send to propagation node if you cant reach me!
about.database_backups_desc: Full snapshots of your communications database.
about.local_snapshots_desc: Create point-in-time restore points on disk.
about.recovery_confirm: Run database recovery? This runs a full integrity check and compacts the database (VACUUM). It can take a while and the app may feel unresponsive. This does not load a backup file.
about.shutdown_confirm: Are you sure you want to shutdown the app? This will stop the server and close the application.
about.tagline_lead: A secure, resilient, and beautiful communications platform powered by the
about.delete_snapshot_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this snapshot?
about.delete_backup_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this backup?
about.restore_snapshot_confirm: Are you sure you want to restore this snapshot? This will overwrite the current database and require an app relaunch.
about.restore_select_file: Select a backup file to restore.
about.restore_file_confirm: Are you sure you want to restore from this backup file? This will overwrite the current database and require an app relaunch.
about.integrity_acknowledged_reset: Integrity issues acknowledged and manifest reset
about.integrity_acknowledge_confirm: Are you sure you want to acknowledge these integrity issues? This will update the security manifest to match the current state of your files.
about.identity_copied: Identity Base32 key copied to clipboard

interfaces.title: Interfaces
interfaces.description: Search, filter and export your Reticulum adapters.
interfaces.no_interfaces_description: Adjust your search or add a new interface.
interfaces.fixed_mtu_hint: Optional. If set, must be at least {min} bytes (Reticulum minimum MTU).
interfaces.fixed_mtu_min: Fixed MTU must be at least {min} bytes (Reticulum minimum).
interfaces.restart_description: Reticulum MeshChatX must be restarted for any interface changes to take effect.
interfaces.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this interface? This can not be undone!
interfaces.discovery_default_bootstrap_only_hint: Kun käytössä, uudet TCP-asiakas- ja runkosovittimet luovat pelkästään alkusidoksen verkkoon. Reticulum voi irrottaa ne, kun muihin havaittuihin sovittimiin on yhdistetty automaattisesti.
interfaces.backbone_transport_identity_hint: Vastaa Reticulum-runkosovittimia, joille on asetettu pelkästään verkko-osoite ja kohdeportti. Käytä hajautusarvoa, jos operaattori tai hakemisto ilmoittaa sen.
interfaces.loopback_local_body: Reticulum käyttää jaettu sisäistä instanssia. Keskustellaksesi toisen paikallisen RNS-prosessin kanssa, osoita TCP-asiakassovitin osoitteeseen 127.0.0.1 ja instanssin porttiin tai liitä ulkoinen sovitinmoduuli.
interfaces.custom_external_intro: Types such as WeaveInterface or your own class are loaded when Reticulum finds a matching module file (TypeName.py) under interfacepath and exposes interface_class (see RNS source). Options below are merged into the interface stanza in your config file.
interfaces.custom_external_docs_hint: Katso ohjekirjasta Interfaces sisäänrakennetuille tyypeille ja ulkoisille moduuleille.
interfaces.import_success: Sovittimet tuotiin. MeshChat on käynnistettävä uudelleen.
interfaces.community_presets_hidden_hint: Yhteisön ehdotukset piilotetaan. Näytä uudelleen tässä tai Asetuksissa.
interfaces.community_presets_empty: Ehdotuksia ei ladattu. Koosta sovelluspaketti uudelleen tai lisää public/community_interfaces.json.
interfaces.discovered_no_config: Tässä kuulutuksessa ei ollut valmista liitettävää kokoonpanolohkoa.
interfaces.rnode_ble_hint: Reticulum käyttää Bluetoothia tällä laitteella. Parita RNode käyttöjärjestelmän asetuksissa ensin. Tämä on mahdollista työpöytäsovelluksessa ja Androidilla. Androidilla on sallittava tarvittavat käyttöoikeudet.
interfaces.rnode_ble_peer_required: Anna RNoden julkinen BLE nimi tai MAC-osoite.
interfaces.rnode_tcp_port_fixed_hint: Reticulum käyttää porttia 7633 RNodessa. Syötä vain isäntänimi tai IP ilman porttia.
interfaces.rnode_tcp_host_required: Syötä isäntänimi tai IP RNoden käyttämiseksi TCPn yli.
interfaces.kernel_iface_picker_help: Laite on valinnainen: yksi ytimen sovitinnimi, tai jätä tyhjäksi sitoaksesi ainoastaan kuuntelu-IP:n välityksellä. Klikkaa riviä täyttääksesi kentän.
interfaces.auto_iface_ifname_chips_hint: Tämän isännän sovittimet: klikkaa lisätäksesi tai poistaaksesi nimiä yllä olevista kentistä.

map.title: Kartta
map.search_timeout_error: Geokoodaaja ei vastannut ajoissa. Se voi olla hidas, ruuhkautunut tai saavuttamattomissa. Yritä uudelleen.
map.tile_connectivity_body: Tarkista verkko, yritä uudelleen, käytä paikallista laattapalvelinta asetuksissa, tai vaihda yhteydettömään tilaan jos MBTiles on ladattu.
map.tile_failover_offline: Online tiles unavailable; switching to offline mode
map.custom_tile_server_unavailable: Mukautettu laattapalvelin ei ole saatavilla yhteydettömässä tilassa
map.custom_nominatim_unavailable: Mukautettu Nominatim-palvelin ei ole saatavilla yhteydettömässä tilassa
map.onboarding_text: Käytä vientityökalua ladataksesi kartan MBTilejä yhteydetöntä tilaa varten.
map.tool_bearing: Suunta ja etäisyys (kaksi napsautusta, ei verkkoyhteyttä)
map.no_nodes_location: Sijaintia jakavia havaittuja sovittimia ei löytynyt
map.north_up: Pohjoinen on ylhäällä (karttaa ei ole kierretty)
map.export_tile_limit_exceeded: Liikaa laattoja yhteen vientiin. Alenna suurennustasoa tai pienennä aluetta.
map.vector_exchange_merge: Yhdistä olemassa oleviin piirroksiin (poista merkki korvataksesi piirrokset)
map.vector_exchange_hint: Tuonnit tukevat kuvakkeita eri muodoissa kuten GeoJSON ja KML. Valitse piirros nähdäksesi sen oheistiedot
map.drop_no_geo_files: GeoJSON, KML, tai KMZ -tiedostoa ei havaittu.
map.drop_no_supported_files: GeoJSON-, KML-, KMZ- tai MBTiles-tiedostoa ei havaittu.

messages.title: Viestit
messages.stamp_ticket_valid: Lähtevien viestien merkintä on voimassa (toimitus heti). Vanhenee {expires}.
messages.stamp_ticket_expired: Leimamerkintä on vanhentunut; seuraava viesti voi vaatia PoW-työtä.
messages.select_conversation_for_pane: Select a conversation to open it here
messages.stranger_banner_text: Osallistuja ei ole yhteystietolistallasi. Liitteet vierailta estetään.
messages.outbound_pathfinding_tooltip: Finding path: Reticulum is resolving a route to this peer. Your message sends when the route is ready.
messages.path_no_route_hint: No route to this peer yet. Use the path finder or send a message to discover one.
messages.path_stale_hint: This path entry is expired and may be rediscovered before the next send.
messages.path_unresponsive_hint: Reticulum marked this path as unresponsive.
messages.send_pathfinding_tooltip: Finding path to peer (Reticulum is resolving a route). Your message sends as soon as the route is ready. Hover status icons in the bubble for details.
messages.select_peer_or_enter_address: Valitse osallistuja sivupalkista tai anna kohdearvo alle
messages.scanner_hint: Osoita kamerasi lxmf://, lxma://, or lxm:// -QR-koodiin.
messages.camera_not_supported: Camera QR scanning is not supported in this browser.
messages.camera_permission_denied: Camera permission denied. Please allow camera access.
messages.invalid_qr_uri: Kelvoton QR-sisältö. Odotettiin lxmf://, lxma:// tai lxm:// -URIa.
messages.clipboard_read_requires_secure_context: Leikepöytä luetaan vain suojatuilla sivuilla (https or http://127.0.0.1). http://0.0.0.0 tai muu ei-paikallinen HTTP lähde estää leikepöydän rajapinnan — avaa sovellus osoitteessa 127.0.0.1 tai käyttäen https-protokollaa, tai liitä painamalla Ctrl+V.
messages.clipboard_write_unavailable: Automaattinen kopiointi epäonnistui. Avaa https-protokollalla tai osoitteessa http://127.0.0.1, tai valitse teksti ja kopioi se käsin.
messages.oversized_body_notice: Viesti on liian pitkä näytettäväksi tässä ({count} merkkiä). Kopioi koko teksti luettavaksi tai muokattavaksi muualla.
messages.raw_path_row_hash_rnpath_hint: The destination hash used by Reticulum for this route. You can find it in the path table.
messages.address_copied: Your LXMF address copied to clipboard
messages.translate_target_invalid: Choose a different target language than the source
messages.remove_image_confirm: Are you sure you want to remove this image attachment?
messages.failed_start_recording_help_mediadevices: This web view does not expose a microphone API.
messages.failed_start_recording_help_web_audio: Web Audio is not available in this browser.
messages.failed_start_recording_help_audio_workle: AudioWorklet is not supported — OPUS voice notes require it.
messages.failed_start_recording_help_permission: Allow microphone access, or try again after another app releases the microphone.
messages.remove_audio_confirm: Are you sure you want to remove this audio attachment?
messages.select_colors_warning: Please select both background and icon colors
messages.banish_confirm: Are you sure you want to banish this user? They will not be able to send you messages or establish links.
messages.delete_conversation_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this conversation?
messages.delete_history_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete all messages in this conversation? This can not be undone!
messages.opportunistic_deferred_tooltip: Message will send as soon as the user comes online or announces.
messages.failed_waiting_announce_tooltip: Delivery failed. Will resend automatically when the contact is reachable.
messages.forward_no_lxmf_destination: This contact has no usable LXMF delivery address.
messages.forward_verify_explanation: Paper LXMF links only work if the full message is available and fits Paper limits. Quoted snippets can be faked.
messages.forward_verify_unavailable: Original message bytes are not cached here, so no verification URI could be built.
messages.forward_verify_not_cached: Original message bytes are not cached here.
messages.forward_content_stub:
_Forwarded via MeshChatX_
Attachments and quoted text belong to the original sender.

settings.share_apk_desc: Send the installed MeshChatX package over Bluetooth, Nearby Share, or another app. Only available in the Android app.
settings.share_apk_short_hint: Opens the system share sheet for this APK.
settings.share_apk_failed: Could not open the share sheet for the APK.
settings.nomad_micron_wasm_desc_after_link: ). When on, the WebAssembly build can load and be updated in settings. When off, Micron uses JavaScript only. Pick the default renderer below; you can still switch from the Nomad browser toolbar.
settings.nomad_micron_default_engine_desc: JavaScript is the default. WebAssembly uses micron-parser-go when the engine above is enabled and the module has loaded.
settings.micron_wasm_update_bundled_only: Using the WASM bundled with this app. Nothing is fetched from the network until you use the actions below.
settings.micron_wasm_update_isolation_note: The browser cannot fully isolate WebAssembly from JavaScript. This app only exposes Micron conversion through a narrow API; rendered HTML is still sanitized. wasm_exec.js always comes from the app bundle to match the Go runtime.
settings.micron_wasm_update_github_url_hint: Press Fetch so the MeshChat server downloads from GitHub (browser stays same-origin for CSP). Source path:
settings.micron_wasm_update_upload_warning: Uploaded WASM is not authenticity-checked. Only use files you trust.
settings.micron_wasm_update_err_empty_tag: Enter a release tag (for example v1.0.5).
settings.micron_wasm_update_err_not_wasm: Choose a file whose name ends with .wasm.
settings.micron_wasm_update_err_too_large: That file is too large to store as a runtime override.
settings.micron_wasm_update_err_too_small: That file is too small to be a valid WASM module.
settings.micron_wasm_update_err_activate_failed: Installed file could not be loaded (check wasm_exec compatibility or try another build). Override was removed.

debug.description: Read application and access logs, filter by severity, and search when troubleshooting.
debug.logs_copied: Logs on this page copied to clipboard

banishment.title: Banished
banishment.description: Review and lift blocks on identities and nodes.
banishment.search_placeholder: Search by hash or display name...
banishment.lift_banishment_confirm: Are you sure you want to lift the banishment for {name}?

nomadnet.archived_version_available: An archived version of this page is available.
nomadnet.select_node_to_browse: Select a Node to start browsing!
nomadnet.existing_download_in_progress: An existing download is in progress. Please wait for it to finish before starting another download.
nomadnet.add_nodes_from_announces: Add nodes from the announces tab.
nomadnet.no_search_results_peers: No peers found matching your search.
nomadnet.listening_for_peers: Listening for peers on the mesh.
nomadnet.block_node_confirm: Are you sure you want to banish {name}? Their announces will be ignored and they won't appear in the announce stream.
nomadnet.remove_favourite_confirm: Are you sure you want to remove this favourite?
nomadnet.identify_confirm: Are you sure you want to identify yourself to this NomadNetwork Node? The page will reload after your identity has been sent.
nomadnet.delete_section_confirm: Delete this section? Favourites will move to the main section.
nomadnet.renderer_hint_micron_wasm_pending: Faster version loading or unavailable. Using the standard version.

nomadnet.bulk_nothing_to_add_favourites: Nothing to add (already favourites or none selected)

archives.description: Search Nomad Network pages stored in your local archive.

docs.title: Documentation
docs.subtitle: Reticulum manual and MeshChatX guides, available offline after setup.
docs.btn_share: Share Reticulum manual as a re-uploadable ZIP
docs.empty_state_hint: Upload a Reticulum manual ZIP to view it offline. Custom or updated documentation is supported.

licenses.title: Third-party licenses
licenses.description: Shows versions and licenses for all software components. This data is collected from the local environment.
licenses.short_description: Dependency versions, authors, and licenses for backend and frontend.

tools.diagnostics_description: Mesh and Reticulum utilities in one place: reachability, paths, file transfer, translation, documentation, and hardware helpers. Open any row for the full tool.

ping.title: Ping
ping.description: Measure round-trip time to another node or app that answers ping.

rnprobe.title: RNProbe
rnprobe.description: Send test payloads over the mesh to check reachability and delay.

rncp.title: RNCP
rncp.description: Send files to or fetch files from another destination over Reticulum, with progress and optional compression.

rnstatus.title: RNStatus
rnstatus.description: Per-interface traffic counters and link status from your Reticulum instance.

rnpath.title: RNPath
rnpath.description: Inspect paths and announce queues, and request or drop routes when you need to steer traffic.
rnpath.purge_confirm: Purge all announce queues? This cannot be undone.

rnpath_trace.title: RNS Path Trace
rnpath_trace.description: List each hop along the path to a destination hash.
rnpath_trace.ready_desc: Enter a destination hash to list hops along the current path.

translator.title: Translator
translator.description: Translate text with LibreTranslate over the network or Argos Translate on this device.

forwarder.title: Forwarder
forwarder.description: Forward LXMF messages between addresses while keeping reply routing intact.

propagation_nodes.title: Propagation nodes
propagation_nodes.description: Pick preferred mesh propagation nodes, watch live stats, and run quick path checks.

sieve_filters.title: Sieve filters
sieve_filters.description: Auto-sort mail: match words in peer names or message text, then hide, silence, move to a folder, or block the sender.
sieve_filters.subtitle: Rules run in order. Scope picks everyone, contacts only, or non-contacts only. Choose substring or regex matching. The first enabled rule whose scope fits and whose targets match wins.
sieve_filters.order_hint: Drag order is top to bottom: the first matching rule applies.
sieve_filters.empty_rules: No rules yet. Add a rule or save an empty list to clear filters.
sieve_filters.terms_placeholder: One per line or separated by commas. Matches are case-insensitive. You can also use regular expressions (one per line).
sieve_filters.match_peer_fields: Peer display name, custom name, contact fields
sieve_filters.match_targets_hint: At least one target must stay enabled.
sieve_filters.flow_source_hint: Peer fields use announced display name, your custom name, and contact name or LXMF address.

message_blocklist.title: Message blocklist
message_blocklist.description: Auto-banish senders when their message or name matches a word or regex from your shared blocklist.
message_blocklist.beta_notice_body: This tool is off until you turn it on. Words match regardless of case. Regex uses normal patterns. If something matches, the sender gets banished right away. Export a list to share with your group, or import one to merge or replace yours.
message_blocklist.enable_hint: When disabled, entries are saved but no automatic banish runs.
message_blocklist.empty_entries: No phrases yet. Add entries or import a shared list.
message_blocklist.match_peer_fields: Peer display name and contact fields
message_blocklist.import_merge_confirm: Merge with your current list? Choose Cancel to replace your list entirely.

repository_server.title: Repository server
repository_server.description: Redistribute MeshChatX and Reticulum-related Python wheels plus your own files over plain HTTP so people on your network—or on this device—can download them.
repository_server.subtitle: Refresh the included software packages, add your own files, or start a download page for other devices.
repository_server.http_err_bind_failed: Could not bind (port in use or permission denied)
repository_server.refresh_bundled_tooltip: Download bundled wheels to this device (needs network)
repository_server.refresh_pip_missing: pip was not found on this system. Install pip and try again.
repository_server.refresh_partial: Some packages could not be downloaded (details below)
repository_server.refresh_partial_toast: Bundled download finished with some failures
repository_server.empty: No files yet. Upload a file or refresh bundled wheels.

rnode_flasher.title: RNode Flasher
rnode_flasher.description: Flash or update RNode firmware from the browser when your hardware and browser support USB or Wi‑Fi flashing.
rnode_flasher.find_device_issue: Can't find your device? Open an issue on
rnode_flasher.provision_eeprom_hint: You need to provision the eeprom in step 3.
rnode_flasher.set_firmware_hash_hint: You need to set the firmware hash in step 4.
rnode_flasher.provision_description: Sets device info, checksum and blank signature
rnode_flasher.done_description: If you made it this far, and all previous steps were successful, your RNode should be ready to use.
rnode_flasher.meshchat_usage: To use RNode with MeshChat, you will need to add an RNodeInterface in the Interfaces → Add Interface page.
rnode_flasher.sideband_usage: To use RNode with Sideband, you will need to configure it in Hardware → RNode and enable Connectivity → Connect via RNode.
rnode_flasher.restart_warning: You must restart MeshChat and Sideband for interface setting changes to take effect, otherwise nothing will happen!
rnode_flasher.eeprom_console_hint: EEPROM dumps are shown in dev tools console.
rnode_flasher.bluetooth_info_1: Bluetooth is not supported on all devices.
rnode_flasher.bluetooth_info_2: Some devices use Bluetooth Classic, and some use BLE (Bluetooth Low Energy)
rnode_flasher.bluetooth_info_3: Put the RNode into Bluetooth Pairing mode, then connect to it from Android Bluetooth settings.
rnode_flasher.bluetooth_info_4: Once you have initiated a pair request from Android, a PIN should show on the RNode display.
rnode_flasher.bluetooth_info_5: In Sideband you will need to enable Connect using Bluetooth in Hardware → RNode.
rnode_flasher.bluetooth_info_6: If your device uses BLE you will also need to enable Device requires BLE in Hardware → RNode.
rnode_flasher.bluetooth_restart_warning: Don't forget to restart Sideband for the setting changes to take effect!
rnode_flasher.tnc_info_1: TNC mode allows an RNode to be used as a KISS compatible TNC over the Serial Port.
rnode_flasher.tnc_info_2: This mode makes it usable with amateur radio software that can talk to a KISS TNC over a serial port.
rnode_flasher.tnc_warning: You must leave TNC mode disabled when using RNode with apps like MeshChat or Sideband.
rnode_flasher.rotation_v180_warning: Setting display rotation requires firmware v1.80+

errors.firmware_not_found_in_release: Recommended firmware not found in the latest release.
errors.web_serial_not_supported: Web Serial is not supported in this browser. Please use Chrome, Edge, or another Chromium-based browser.
errors.no_device_selected: No device selected. Please select a serial port.
errors.not_an_rnode: Selected device is not an RNode! Please make sure you've selected the correct serial port.
errors.select_firmware_first: Please select a firmware file (.zip) first.
errors.esptool_not_loaded: esptool-js could not be loaded. Please refresh the page and try again.
errors.no_flash_config: Flash configuration is not available for the selected device. Please select a different device or check the firmware file.
errors.failed_extract: Required file "{file}" not found in firmware ZIP file. Please download the correct firmware for your device.
errors.failed_detect: Failed to detect RNode. Make sure the device is connected and in the correct mode.
errors.provisioned_already: Eeprom is already provisioned. You must wipe it to reprovision!
errors.not_provisioned: Eeprom is not provisioned. You must do this first!
errors.no_main_bin: Could not locate the main firmware binary in the ZIP.
errors.invalid_host: Please enter a valid host or IP address.
errors.bluetooth_flash_unsupported: Bluetooth cannot be used to flash firmware. Use Serial or WiFi to flash, then return to Bluetooth for management.

alerts.firmware_downloaded: Recommended firmware has been downloaded and loaded.
alerts.dfu_ready: Device should now be in DFU mode. You can now proceed with flashing firmware.
alerts.eeprom_wipe_confirm: Are you sure you want to wipe the eeprom on this device? This will take about 30 seconds. An alert will show when the eeprom wipe has finished.

rnode_flasher.open_original_tab: Open the original flasher in a new tab
rnode_flasher.wifi_help: The IP address of your RNode on the local network.

serial.title: USB serial is unavailable
serial.polyfill_not_loaded: USB serial polyfill has not been loaded yet.
serial.android_webview_no_serial: Android does not support Web Serial in this view. Use a desktop browser or the built-in flasher.

serial.android_use_chrome: On Android, opening this page in Chrome lets you use Web Serial via WebUSB.

bluetooth.requires_https: Open the flasher over HTTPS or via localhost to enable Bluetooth.
bluetooth.unknown: Bluetooth cannot be initialised in this environment.

suggestions.not_provisioned: EEPROM is not provisioned. Run step 3 (Provision EEPROM).
suggestions.firmware_hash_missing: Firmware hash is missing. Run step 4 (Set Firmware Hash).
suggestions.firmware_hash_mismatch: Firmware hash mismatch. Re-flash the firmware and re-run step 4.
suggestions.product_mismatch: Selected product does not match the connected device.
suggestions.no_firmware_version: Could not read firmware version. Try reconnecting the device.
suggestions.detect_failed: Could not detect this RNode. Verify cable, port, and power.
suggestions.read_timeout: Device did not respond in time. Try reconnecting or rebooting it.

micron_editor.wasm_inactive: JS engine active (slow parser, click for WASM)

reticulum_config_editor.title: Reticulum Config Editor
reticulum_config_editor.description: Edit the main Reticulum (RNS) configuration file inside MeshChatX. Restart RNS to apply changes.
reticulum_config_editor.info: This is the raw Reticulum config file. Saving will not apply changes until RNS is restarted.
reticulum_config_editor.confirm_restore: Restore the Reticulum config to defaults? Your current config will be overwritten.
reticulum_config_editor.confirm_leave: You have unsaved changes. Leave anyway?
reticulum_config_editor.restart_description: Reticulum must be restarted for your config changes to take effect.
reticulum_config_editor.tip_sections: The config must contain [reticulum] and [interfaces] sections.
reticulum_config_editor.tip_restart: Use the Restart RNS button or the Interfaces page to apply changes.
reticulum_config_editor.tip_mobile: Useful whenever you prefer not to edit the file in another program on disk.

paper_message.title: Paper Message
paper_message.description: Encode LXMF messages as QR codes or scan codes back into the app.

mesh_server.description: Publish Micron pages and small files for mesh peers to open.

relay_chat.no_rooms: No rooms joined. Join a room to start chatting.
relay_chat.no_room_selected: Select a room to view messages.

relay_chat.clear_messages_confirm: Clear all messages in this room?

relay_chat.host_hub_not_running: Start the hub before managing rooms or members.
relay_chat.host_delete_hub_confirm: Delete this hosted hub? Connected clients will be disconnected.

relay_chat.disabled_message: Relay Chat is turned off in Settings. Enable it under Appearance to use hubs and hosting.
relay_chat.discovery_subtitle: Relay Chat hubs heard announcing on the network.
relay_chat.discovery_empty: No hubs discovered yet. They appear here as they announce.
relay_chat.search_syntax_hint: Examples: hello world · alice OR bob · DATE:today · DATE:2026-06-02

rncp.title: RNCP - Reticulum Network Copy
rncp.description: Send, listen, or fetch files over Reticulum using RNCP (chunked transfers, optional compression).
rncp.step_1: 1. To **receive** a file, go to the **Listen** tab, enter allowed identity hashes (who can send to you), and click **Start Listening**.
rncp.step_2: 2. To **send** a file, get the **Destination Hash** of a listening node, enter the **Local File Path**, and click **Send File**.
rncp.step_3: 3. To **fetch** a file, get the **Destination Hash** of a node listening with 'Allow Fetch' enabled, enter the **Remote File Path**, and click **Fetch File**.
rncp.provide_remote_file_path: Please provide a remote file path!
rncp.provide_allowed_hash: Please provide at least one allowed identity hash!
rncp.listening_active_background: Listening continues in the background. Return here to manage or stop.
rncp.web_path_hint: Browsers cannot expose full file paths. Use the desktop app to browse, or paste the full path to the file on this machine.
rncp.web_save_path_prompt: Enter the absolute folder path on the machine running MeshChat (server) where the fetched file should be saved:

rnsh.usage_hint: Create connect or listen sessions, then manage them on the Sessions tab. Output streams live while MeshChatX is running.
rnsh.name: Session name
rnsh.select_or_create_session: Select or create a session to begin.
rnsh.destination_required: Destination hash is required for connect mode.
rnsh.title: RNSH - Reticulum Remote Shell
rnsh.config_dir_placeholder: Defaults to the app's Reticulum config
rnsh.config_dir_hint: Leave blank to share the MeshChatX Reticulum instance. Override only to use a separate Reticulum config directory.

rnprobe.title: RNProbe - Destination Probe
rnprobe.description: Send probes with configurable size to measure RTT and delivery.
rnprobe.no_probes_yet: No probes yet. Start a probe to test connectivity.
rnprobe.provide_full_name: Please provide a full destination name!

rnstatus.title: RNStatus - Network Status
rnstatus.description: Per-interface statistics and link status from your RNS instance.
rnstatus.no_interfaces_found: No interfaces found. Click refresh to load status.

translator.title: Translator
translator.description: Translate text via a LibreTranslate server or local Argos Translate.
translator.api_server_description: Enter the base URL of your LibreTranslate server (e.g., https://libretranslate.com or http://localhost:5000).
translator.api_key_placeholder: Leave empty unless your provider requires one
translator.api_key_description: If required, LibreTranslate expects this as api_key in the JSON translate body and optionally on the languages request. Omit for typical self-hosted instances.
translator.argos_not_detected_desc: To use local translation, you must install the Argos Translate package using one of the following methods:
translator.note_restart_required: Note: After installation, you may need to restart the application and install language packages via the Argos Translate CLI.
translator.no_language_packages_desc: Argos Translate is installed but no language packages are available. Install language packages using one of the following commands:
translator.install_specific_pair: Install specific language pair (example: English to German)
translator.after_install_note: After installing language packages, click "Refresh Languages" to reload available languages.
translator.languages_loaded_from: Languages are loaded from LibreTranslate API or Argos Translate packages.
translator.failed_load_languages: Failed to load languages. Make sure LibreTranslate is running or Argos Translate is installed.
translator.failed_translate: Translation failed. Make sure LibreTranslate is running or Argos Translate is installed.
translator.select_languages_warning: Please select both source and target languages.
translator.auto_detect_not_supported: Auto-detection is not supported with Argos Translate. Please select a source language.

call.voicemails_will_appear_here: When people leave you messages, they'll show up here.
call.voicemail_requires_espeak: Voicemail requires `espeak-ng` to generate greetings. Please install it on your system.
call.enable_voicemail_description: Accept calls automatically and record messages
call.greeting_text_description: This text will be converted to speech using eSpeak NG.
call.no_greeting_audio_found: No greeting audio found. Please generate one first.
call.enable_custom_ringtone_description: Play a custom audio file for all incoming calls
call.supports_audio_formats: Supports MP3, OGG, WAV, M4A, FLAC. Will be converted to Opus.
call.no_ringtone_audio_found: No ringtone audio found. Please upload one first.
call.ringtone_for_non_contacts: Ringtone for callers not in your contacts
call.no_audio_input_found: No input audio device found. Check microphone and permissions.
call.microphone_permission_denied: Microphone permission denied. Allow access and try again.
call.failed_to_update_dnd: Failed to update Do Not Disturb status
call.failed_to_update_recording_status: Failed to update call recording status
call.failed_to_send_to_voicemail: Failed to send call to voicemail
call.failed_load_audio_edit: Failed to load audio for editing

contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.description: Manage your contact list and share/import identities.
contacts.invalid_contact_input: Invalid input. Use a 32-char hash or lxma:// URI.
contacts.failed_build_contact_uri: Could not build a share URI for this contact
contacts.scanner_hint: Point camera at an identity QR code.
contacts.camera_not_supported: Camera QR scanning is not supported in this browser.
contacts.camera_permission_denied: Camera permission denied. Please allow camera access.
contacts.import_file_hint: Select a JSON file exported from Contacts.

android_storage.setup_desc: File-manager storage is recommended. You can browse and back up your identity and messages under Android/data/com.meshchatx/files/. The app restarts when you change this during setup.
android_storage.setup_internal_desc: Hidden from file managers; only this app can access it.
android_storage.upgrade_desc: Your MeshChatX data is in private app storage. Copy it to the file-manager folder so you can browse and back up files, then restart the app.
android_storage.copy_restart_hint: Copy scheduled. Closing the app — open MeshChatX again to finish.
android_storage.restart_to_apply: Restart the app to apply your storage choice.

tutorial.title: Getting Started
tutorial.welcome_desc: The future of off-grid communication. Secure, decentralized, and unstoppable.
tutorial.migration_desc: Data was found in .reticulum-meshchat. Copy it into .reticulum-meshchatx and restart, or start fresh and leave the old folder as-is.
tutorial.migration_done_restart: Restart the app to use the new folder.
tutorial.security_desc: Massive improvements in speed, security, and crash recovery.
tutorial.security_desc_page: Massive improvements in speed, security, and integrity with built-in crash recovery.
tutorial.maps_desc: OpenLayers w/ MBTiles support (export and offline support) and custom API endpoints.
tutorial.maps_desc_page: OpenLayers support with offline MBTiles (export and offline support) and custom API endpoints for online maps.
tutorial.voice_desc: Voicemail, ringtones, phonebook, and contact sharing.
tutorial.voice_desc_page: Crystal clear voice calls over mesh. Voicemail, custom ringtones, and phonebook discovery.
tutorial.tools_desc: Micron Editor, NomadNet, RNS tools, Docs.
tutorial.tools_desc_page: Micron editor, NomadNet nodes, RNS tools, and integrated documentation.
tutorial.archiver_desc_page: Manual and Automated page archiving tools for offline browsing.
tutorial.banishment_desc: Banish annoying people, nodes and support for RNS blackhole level dropping their announces
tutorial.palette_desc: Navigate everything instantly and customize shortcuts.
tutorial.palette_desc_page: Navigate the entire application and customize your workflow with instant shortcuts.
tutorial.i18n_desc: Available in English, German, Italian, Russian, Dutch, French, and Spanish.
tutorial.i18n_desc_page: Full internationalization support for English, German, Italian, Russian, Dutch, French, and Spanish.
tutorial.connect_desc: To send messages, you need to connect to a Reticulum interface.
tutorial.connect_desc_page: Use one of the public networks below or add a custom interface from the Interfaces page.
tutorial.identity_desc: Choose a new identity or import an existing key before connecting.
tutorial.identity_desc_page: Choose a new identity or import an existing key before connecting to the mesh.
tutorial.identity_new_desc: Keep the default identity and optionally set your display name.
tutorial.identity_import_desc: Import from an identity file or paste a base32 key.
tutorial.identity_import_required: Choose an identity file or paste a base32 key to import.
tutorial.custom_interfaces_desc: Want to add a bespoke interface? Head to the Interfaces page to configure a custom connection.
tutorial.custom_interfaces_desc_page: For any private relays or hardware you manage yourself, add them through the dedicated Interfaces page.
tutorial.learn_create_desc: Discover how to use MeshChatX to its full potential.
tutorial.learn_create_desc_page: Discover how to use MeshChatX to its full potential and create your own content.
tutorial.documentation_desc: Read the official MeshChatX and Reticulum documentation.
tutorial.documentation_desc_page: Guides for MeshChatX and the Reticulum stack.
tutorial.micron_editor_desc: Take a look at the Micron Editor for a guide on creating mesh-native pages.
tutorial.micron_editor_desc_page: Learn how to create mesh-native pages and interactive content using the Micron markup language.
tutorial.identities_card_desc: Switch personas, export keys, and keep separate profiles on one device.
tutorial.identities_card_desc_page: Run multiple Reticulum identities on one install: create and delete personas, switch who you are on the mesh, and export keys when you need them.
tutorial.explore_nodes_desc: Open the map or network graph.
tutorial.ready_desc: Everything is set up. Reticulum has been restarted with your new configuration.
tutorial.ready_desc_page: MeshChatX is now configured and Reticulum has been hot-reloaded with your new settings.
tutorial.docker_note: Reticulum was restarted automatically. If anything looks off, you can restart MeshChatX from the menu.
tutorial.restart_desc_page: Reticulum was hot-reloaded with your new configuration. No manual restart is required for normal use.
tutorial.skip_confirm: Are you sure you want to skip the setup? You'll need to manually add interfaces later.
tutorial.discovery_question: Do you want to use community interface discovering and auto-connect?
tutorial.discovery_desc: This allows MeshChatX to automatically find and connect to public community nodes near you or on the internet.
tutorial.mode_discovery_desc: Find and auto-connect to nearby and internet-reachable Reticulum nodes. You'll pick one or more bootstrap nodes next.
tutorial.mode_local_desc: Use Reticulum on your LAN/Wi-Fi only. Adds an AutoInterface for zero-config local mesh.
tutorial.mode_manual_desc: Skip and configure interfaces yourself from the Interfaces page later.
tutorial.mode_change_later: You can change connection settings any time from Reticulum settings.
tutorial.bootstrap_desc: Bootstrap nodes give discovery a starting point. Select one or more, then continue.
tutorial.bootstrap_pick_random_none: No suitable TCP community presets are available. Refresh community presets or pick nodes manually (discovered lists are not used for random pick).
tutorial.bootstrap_only_hint: When on, every interface you add in this step is created as bootstrap-only, which Reticulum can drop after enough links auto-connect. The default is adjustable in Interfaces, Discovery settings.
tutorial.bootstrap_desc_page: Bootstrap nodes give Reticulum a starting point so it can discover the rest of the network. Select one or more from discovered or community nodes below.
tutorial.bootstrap_pick_at_least_one: Pick at least one bootstrap node
tutorial.failed_add_bootstrap_none: No bootstrap interfaces were added. Check your selection and try again.
tutorial.connect_mode_required: Choose a connection mode to continue
tutorial.ready_finished: Reticulum has been restarted with your new configuration
tutorial.propagation_question: Do you want to auto-configure propagation mode?
tutorial.propagation_desc: Propagation nodes act like an always-on mailbox for your messages. They securely store messages while you are offline and deliver them as soon as you reconnect to the network.
tutorial.propagation_auto: Auto-configure will automatically find and connect to the most reliable propagation node available. If no node is currently available, MeshChatX will wait for one to appear. Until then, offline message syncing will be unavailable.
tutorial.propagation_manual_desc: You can manually configure a propagation node later in settings, or leave it empty if you don't want to use one.

command_palette.nav_repository_server_desc: MeshChatX wheels, Reticulum packages, and your files over HTTP
command_palette.nav_reticulum_config_editor_desc: Edit the raw Reticulum config file
